subject: english
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
topic_title: Essay Writing: Argumentative Essay on Indiscipline
learning_objectives: State the structure of the argumentative task
Develop paragraphs to support an argument

sections.heading: Task Guidance
sections.content: The note directs students to write the topic and avoid debate-style greetings.

sections.heading: Structure
sections.content: Define the subject intelligently in the introduction, develop supporting paragraphs, and conclude the argument in the last paragraph.
